description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and defines two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a job named build that runs on all branches except master, executes the before_script `docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" $CI_REGISTRY`, then runs `docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" .` and `docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"`. Also in the build stage add a job named build-master that runs only on the master branch, uses the same before_script, and runs `docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" .` followed by `docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE"`. In the deploy stage add a job named deploy that runs only on master and is skipped when the commit message matches /skip-deploy/, uses the alpine:latest image, sets the production environment with URL https://api.collabatube.com/, and runs `apk update`, `apk add openssh-client`, `echo "$PROD_SSH_KEY" > key`, `chmod 0600 key`, and `ssh -o "StrictHostKeyChecking no" -i key evkon@collabatube.com "cd code/deploy && make pull-api start-api"`.
